subject: [PATCH v2 3/5] x86/virt/tdx: Add SEAMCALL wrapper for TDH.SYS.DISABLE

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau
reviews.summary: Raised questions about the behavior of the SEAMCALL wrapper for TDH.SYS.DISABLE in various return code scenarios, including kexec and crash kernel start. Asked if the module can be shut down cleanly.

reviews.author: Verma, Vishal L
reviews.summary: Provided explanations for the safe behavior of the SEAMCALL wrapper in TDX_SYS_SHUTDOWN and TDX_SYS_NOT_READY cases. Asked about the semantics of sys_disable in case of a crash in the module.

reviews.author: Edgecombe, Rick P
reviews.summary: Discussed the return code for TDX_SYS_NOT_READY and suggested returning success. Also discussed defensive programming and the kdump case.

2026-03-31.patch_summary: The patch adds a SEAMCALL wrapper for TDH.SYS.DISABLE, but the discussion focuses on the return codes and their implications.
